title: Ding
description: Plays a configurable sound when Minecraft loads and reaches the Main Menu, connects to a server or finishes reloading resources.
body:
Very simple mod: Plays a **configurable sound** when: - Minecraft loads and reaches the Main Menu - The world loads - Minecraft is done reloading resources
It’s called “Ding” because that’s the sound that plays when you pick up an XP orb.

Client-side only.
